Home / Products / Folding Box Board

Folding Box Board

FBB Paper

FBB, also known as Folding Box Board, is made up of multiple layers of mechanical pulp between layers of chemical pulp, a low density material with high stiffness. It features a printable bleached surface, an unbleached yellowish centre layer and a bleached inner layer, making it ideal for scoring and bending without tearing or splitting.

🧩  Construction: Chemical pulp / mechanical pulp / chemical pulp layers
Talk to our team

Applications

  • Health & beauty packaging
  • Frozen foods
  • Confectionery
  • Pharmaceutical cartons
  • Cigarette packaging

Key Properties

  • Low density, high stiffness
  • Smooth surface for superior print
  • Excellent for foil stamping & cold foil
  • High thickness with brightness
  • Recyclable & eco friendly
  • Lightweight, lowers transport cost

Specifications

StructureBleached / yellowish centre / bleached inner
FinishSmooth, high brightness

Variants & Coatings

Various grammagesBleached surface
FAQ

Folding Box Board, questions answered

What is Folding Box Board used for?
Folding Box Board is used for health & beauty packaging, frozen foods, confectionery, pharmaceutical cartons, cigarette packaging.
Does K P Packaging manufacture or distribute Folding Box Board?
K P Packaging is an authorized distributor of Folding Box Board, sourced from leading Indian paper mills.
What are the key features of Folding Box Board?
Low density, high stiffness; Smooth surface for superior print; Excellent for foil stamping & cold foil; High thickness with brightness.
